response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA in a production context, and cloud/secure development lifecycle experience is absent or tangential.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and create educational content
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional settings
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
Lacks exposure to cloud-native or on-prem industrial automation platform development
